subcodes.first_line: In this day all things speak forth through the blessed word "The Glory hath come!" Such is that Name at which the limbs of the ungodly tremble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز جمیع اشیاء بکلمه مبارکه قد اتی البهاء ناطق اینست آن اسمیکه فرائص مشرکین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @Greatest Name, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
